name: app-website-evaluator
description: Evaluate an app or website and produce a prioritized, evidence-backed report with a standardized, coverage-honest scorecard: each dimension scored 0-100 with a letter grade and a weight-averaged overall that is starred when part of the weight could not be assessed (e.g. Security in dir mode), plus optional --json. AI-readiness parse-validates JSON-LD (an invalid block FAILs) and credits rich schema types (FAQPage/Review/Article/HowTo). Covers SEO and crawlability, AI-readiness, social/sharing assets, security and standards best-practices, performance/load-time, and growth — which communities to join or submit to, and concrete PR/advertising wins — all tailored to the specific type of app/website and its community.
